steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between two organisms. Both Artemia franciscana and Achromobacter share one key trait: they live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — names only one organism: Cannot show a shared feature with only one subject. ✗
  • Choice B — names only one organism: Same problem. ✗
  • Choice C — names neither organism explicitly: Fails to establish any relationship between the two. ✗
  • Choice D — 'both live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake': Names both organisms and states their shared habitat, directly establishing the similarity. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
